commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the macOS About settings copyright text to 2026, adds a changelog entry, and adjusts changed-check planning so non-macOS hosts without SwiftLint emit an explicit app-lint skip with matching test coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main still renders the 2025 copyright literal in the macOS About settings view. I did not launch the app locally, but the source path and source PR proof make the observable issue high-confidence.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; this active automerge replacement has no blocking code finding from review, and the remaining action is normal current-head validation and merge gating.
